zh.lifeSummary: 當Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo於大約1110年出生在義大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托時，他的父親Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria57歲，母親Alix de Savoie47歲。他於1155年與Donna Eléanora di Arborea結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1175年在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左享年66歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo于大约1110年出生在意大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托时，他的父亲Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria57岁，母亲Alix de Savoie47岁。他于1155年与Donna Eléanora di Arborea结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1175年在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左享年66岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Alfio, Carmelo, Mariano, Pasquale, Angelina, Carmine, Gaetano, Gerardo, Guillermo, Leonardo, Lucio, Rocco, Rosario, Sal, Sebastiano.

variants.name: Vastola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alfonso, Amedeo, Carmine, Dino, Emileo, Salvator.
Italian (Campania; Vàstola): probably a derivative of Vasta .

variants.name: Basta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Adly, Attia, Hakeem, Hassan, Karim, Makram, Medhat, Mervat, Mohamed, Onsy, Sameh.

Italian (southern): perhaps from the personal name Basta, from basta ‘that's enough!’ (i.e. enough children in the family). Since the surname is found among the Albanian speakers of Calabria and Sicily, it may alternatively be of Albanian origin, probably related to 4 below.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name   Bastian   (short form of   Sebastian  ).

nameMeanings.name: Manfred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Germanic personal name, usually said to be from man ‘man’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. However, it is more likely that the first element was magin ‘strength’ (the usual Norman form being Mainfred) or manag ‘much’. This name was in use among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain. However, it did not become part of the common stock of English given names, and was reintroduced from Germany in the 19th century. It was a traditional name among the Hohenstaufens, and was borne by the last Hohenstaufen king of Sicily ( 1258–66 ), who died in battle against papal forces at Benevento. The name was also used by Byron for the central character in his poetic drama Manfred ( 1817 ), a brooding outcast, tormented by incestuous love for his half-sister.

variants.name: Manfried
meanings: From an old Germanic personal name, usually said to be from man ‘man’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. However, it is more likely that the first element was magin ‘strength’ (the usual Norman form being Mainfred) or manag ‘much’. This name was in use among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain. However, it did not become part of the common stock of English given names, and was reintroduced from Germany in the 19th century. It was a traditional name among the Hohenstaufens, and was borne by the last Hohenstaufen king of Sicily ( 1258–66 ), who died in battle against papal forces at Benevento. The name was also used by Byron for the central character in his poetic drama Manfred ( 1817 ), a brooding outcast, tormented by incestuous love for his half-sister.

en.lifeSummary: When Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo was born about 1110, in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italy, his father, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, was 57 and his mother, Alix de Savoie, was 47. He married Donna Eléanora di Arborea in 1155. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1175, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 66, and was buried in Revello, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo est né environ 1110, à Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italie, son père, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Alix de Savoie, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Donna Eléanora di Arborea en 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1175, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo um 1110 in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria 57 und seine Mutter Alix de Savoie 47. Er hat 1155 Donna Eléanora di Arborea geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1175 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien und wurde in Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo è nato il circa 1110 nel Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia, il suo padre, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Savoie, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Donna Eléanora di Arborea nel 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1175, nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzoが約1110年にイタリアアブルズゾチエティヴァストーで生まれた時，父Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguriaは57歳，母Alix de Savoieは47歳であった。1155年にDonna Eléanora di Arboreaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1175年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで66歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントクウネオレベロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo(이)가 대략 1110년 이탈리아 아브루즈오 치티 바스토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Savoie(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1155년 Donna Eléanora di Arborea(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1175년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 러에벨로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Itália, seu pai, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Savoie, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Donna Eléanora di Arborea em 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1175, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo родился около 1110 г. в местности васто, чиети, абруззо, Италия, его отцу по имени Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Savoie, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Donna Eléanora di Arborea в 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1175 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ривеллоу, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

sm.from 1142 to 1175: mai le 1142 e o'o I le 1175

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo nació aproximadamente 1110, en Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia, su papá, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Alix de Savoie, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Donna Eléanora di Arborea en 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1175, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
